body.title: D319-D325: Config file split + unified installer with migration filters
body.description: Retire .env via migration filters. installer.py runs on every 'igor' launch: checks migration_level, applies pending migrations in order, then launches. Migration N = .env → split cfg files. No separate one-time script — migrations are idempotent and automatic. Files: wild_igor/setup_assets/ (new: installer.py, cfg templates), env_sync.py (load multiple files in order), igor.ps1 + igor bash wrapper (hand off to installer.py), igor.bat (fix igor_loop.ps1→igor.ps1), install_igor_linux.sh (fix hardcoded /home/akien path). Split: swarm/swarm.cfg, swarm/machines.json, instance/igor.cfg, igor.switches.cfg, igor.models.cfg, igor.credentials.cfg, igor.context.<person>.cfg, igor.context.<person>.confidential.cfg. D319-D325.
